title: Launceston, Tasmania — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Launceston, Tasmania: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Launceston is a city in Tasmania with a population of 87,678. Tasmania’s northern city with Cataract Gorge, Tamar Valley wine region, and beautifully preserved Victorian streets.

Last updated: July 11, 2026
